author: IGN YouTube
text:
Cozy Marbles - Official Demo Launch Trailer
Take a look at the Demo Launch Trailer for Cozy Marbles, a marble track simulation game developed by Pixel Pea Games. Players will lay out tracks and design intricate levels to see the marbles flow from one point to another. Design and customize marbles in Cozy Marbles, coming soon to PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Boys: Trigger Warning - Official PS VR2 Launch Trailer
Take a look at the PS VR2 Launch Trailer for The Boys: Trigger Warning, a VR story-driven adventure game developed by Arvore. Players will step into the outlandish world of The Boys in VR with devastating powers, corrupt superheroes, and plenty of hilarity to partake in. Enjoy PS VR2-specific features with eye-tracking support, enhanced visual fidelity, dynamic lighting, smooth high-refresh-rate gameplay, and PlayStation 5 Pro enhancements. The Boys: Trigger Warning is available now for PlayStation VR2 (PS VR2).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stupid Never Dies - Official Gameplay Trailer
Don't miss the Gameplay Trailer for Stupid Never Dies, an upcoming third-person action-adventure shooter developed by GPTrack50. Players will fight to bring their beloved back to life by venturing into dungeon after dungeon. Put powerful abilities to good use and take on the undead in Stupid Never Dies, coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5) and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Embers of the Uncrowned - Official Demo Announcement Trailer
Check out gameplay from Embers of the Uncrowned in this latest trailer for the upcoming dark fantasy MMORPG experience featuring fast-paced isometric combat with brutal, gory visuals. Embers of the Uncrowned will be available on PC. A demo will be available during Steam Next Fest from June 15 to June 22 PDT.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
UploadVR Summer Showcase 2026
Every June and December, UploadVR hosts a showcase that brings together the newest games and most important updates in VR. This edition of The UploadVR Showcase will feature 33 exclusive VR game trailers. For more information, head to uploadvr.com

#IGN #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Slayblade - Official Reveal Trailer
Take a look at the Reveal Trailer for Slayblade, a battle-top action roguelite game developed by Henry's House and Oscar Brittain. Players will collect parts, merge abilities, and take on opponents in battle-top engagements to acquire upgrades. Make cold hard cash and win the city in Slayblade, coming soon to PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: Edward and Caroline Cutscene | IGN First
Edward and Caroline share a slightly awkward moment over a mug of hot chocolate in this cutscene from Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, the upcoming remake of the fan-favorite pirate-themed entry in the long-running Assassin's Creed series. Black Flag Resynced will be available on July 9 for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Destiny 2 - Official 'So Far, Together' Trailer
Watch the 'So Far, Together' Trailer for Destiny 2, the hit first-person action MMO developed by Bungie. Players can reminisce about the adventures, trials, victories, and everything in between experienced by players across the Destiny franchise. From the Witch Queen to the Taken King, Guardians will continue to make their own fate. Per Audacia Ad Astra, Destiny 2 is available now for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu - Official Gameplay Overview Trailer
Don't miss the Gameplay Overview Trailer for The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu, a four-player co-op horror first-person shooter developed by ACE Team. Players will enter the depths of a South American cursed jungle with a team to take on all manner of enemies, secure riches, and maintain their sanity as madness creeps in. Survive the Lovecraftian threats in The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu, launching on July 15 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lords of the Fallen 2 - Official Gameplay Teaser Trailer
Take a look at the Gameplay Teaser Trailer for Lords of the Fallen 2, a third-person dark fantasy melee-based action RPG developed by CI Games. Players can get a gritty look at the game's soulslike combat as a world buckles between life and death. Fight through the realm of the dead in Lords of the Fallen 2, coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Final Fantasy Resonance - Exclusive Boss Fight Gameplay
Final Fantasy Resonance was just revealed and we got play it during a visit to Square Enix. It’s the first HD-2D Final Fantasy game and brings the series back to turn-based combat while adapting the story of Brave Exvius for a traditional console-style RPG. Here we have gameplay of two boss fights - the first is against a main story boss early in the story and the second one is an optional fight against Ramuh who can be summoned into battle after you defeat him.
 
Final Fantasy Resonance comes out on October 22 for all major platforms including Switch 1 and 2, and you can check out what editor Michael Higham thinks of the game from his exclusive hands-on preview right here - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cet1Opcq0AA

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stern Pinball's Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye - Official Trailer
Roll out for battle with Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye by Stern Pinball! Check out the latest Stern Pinball's Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye trailer for a look at this pinball machine featuring the iconic characters, as the Autobots and Decepticons lock into the battle. The trailer also showcases features and what you can expect, including a look at the Celebratory Special Mode. Stern Pinball's Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye pinball machine is available now.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
PS5 vs Xbox vs Switch 2: Who Had the Best Showcase? - Next-Gen Console Watch
All three platforms have held their big summer showcases. They’ve laid out their plans for the rest of the year and into 2027. So it’s time to survey the results. Who had the best showcase? Who has the best game lineup? On this epsiode of Next-Gen Console Watch, we dive into the Xbox, PlayStation, and Nintendo showcases. Which one did you like the best?  

#IGN #Gaming #Nintendo
